'''Aganof''' were non-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] native to the underground caves of [[Kuras III]] in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
They had long bodies that moved low to the ground on rows of small "legs". Their dorsal side was lined with heat-dissipating flaps and olfactory stalks. Beneath each flap was a small mouth that caught tiny creatures attracted to the flap's heat. Each end of the Aganof body ended in a jointed limb tipped with a sharp claw. Blind and deaf, Aganof relied on vibrations and scents for communication.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />
[[File:Aganof-AE.png|thumb|left|200px|An Agonof.]]
Aganof were [[Gender/Legends|hermaphroditic]]: all Aganof could lay fertilized eggs in the [[spawning caves]].<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

==Society and culture==
They considered [[infectious moss]] a delicacy, and there was the possibility that an infected humanoid could persuade the Aganof to eat the moss off their bodies.<ref name="PC">''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''</ref>  While highly intellectual and philosophical, they knew little of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] beyond their caves, and had little in the way of contact with the surface-dwelling [[Pulra]]s and [[Hairy Savage]]s.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

All Aganof born in the same cave were considered a tribal unit and lead by the eldest. The species had no word for "war" and would often get together for philosophical debates and intellectual arguments. Due to their underground living, they had no concept of the sky or outer space.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
